context_state.divergence_note: Smoke test steps 1-7 complete against CF Tunnel URL from tunnel-ready-001.json.

payload.subject: Smoke test steps 1–7 PASS — CF Tunnel live, PSQ endpoint healthy

step_2_wrangler_dev.detail: Worker starts on 127.0.0.1:8787 with no fatal errors. fs.realpathSync blocker resolved — converted top-level static import to dynamic await import() inside streamAgentResponse generator.

step_4_score.input_text: I feel completely overwhelmed and cannot stop crying. Everything feels hopeless and I cannot find a way out.

step_8_browser_render.action: Open interface/public/index.html in browser. Verify: PSQ radar renders, hierarchy panel visible, hollow dots for below-threshold dims (authority_dynamics, regulatory_capacity, trust_conditions, cooling_capacity, defensive_architecture), dotted underline for artifact dims.
step_8_browser_render.artifact_dims_to_watch: dims where |raw_score - score| > 0.5: threat_exposure (raw 2.62 → score 4.34, delta 1.72), resilience_baseline (raw 2.55 → score 1.70, delta 0.85)

fix_note.issue: interface/src/agent.js: top-level `import { query } from '@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk'` caused fs.realpathSync call at Miniflare module initialization — crashing the Worker before any route was reachable.
fix_note.fix: Removed static import. Added `const { query } = await import('@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk')` as first line of streamAgentResponse generator. SDK now loads on first request, after runtime is fully initialized.

gate_status.gate: All 8 steps pass before Phase 4 production commit
gate_status.current_status: 7/8 PASS — blocked only on step 8 (browser render, manual verification by user)
gate_status.next_action: User verifies step 8 in browser. On confirmation → Phase 4 production deploy.
